channel.title: Abouts on Sam´s corner
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on Sam´s corner

item.title: About
item.description:
My own corner of the internet

Welcome to the a calm, cozy corner of an otherwise chaotic and increasingly annoying internet. There´s just not much going on here. I will post some updates on my thoughts, projects and life in general. Feel free to have a look around!

Keep it low-tech! No finance buzzwords, AI slop or datacenters involved here.
